description.value:
Archetype

Your rubber body reaches its pinnacle, awakening to its fullest passive potential. You gain the following permanent benefits (suppressed while Sea-Bound):

  • You are immune to bludgeoning damage (replaces resistance 5 from the dedication).
  • You are immune to falling damage.
  • Rubber Deflect [free action] (trigger: a non-magical ranged Strike targets you; frequency: once per round) — Your rubber body absorbs the projectile. The triggering attack automatically misses.
